item.description: 🚨ASMONGOLD LOVES RUPERT LOWE This is such a wholesome set of clips 🙏 You're watching one of the world's most famous streamers discover the same thing we have done Britain has a chance to survive 🇬🇧

item.title: @elonmusk: Try@GrokImagine. It gets better every week!
item.description: Try@GrokImagine. It gets better every week!

item.title: @elonmusk: NEWS: Microsoft has announced a new collaboration with Starlink to expand internet access in rural, ...
item.description: NEWS: Microsoft has announced a new collaboration with Starlink to expand internet access in rural, agricultural, and hard-to-reach communities worldwide, unveiled at Mobile World Congress 2026 alongside the company's milestone of connecting over 299 million people, surpassing its 2022 goal of 250 million. The Starlink collaboration will be paired with local delivery partners and community institutions to build what Microsoft calls "AI-ready communities" in underserved regions, addressing a global gap the company estimates at 2.2 billion people still offline. Microsoft framed the partnership as part of a broader evolution toward not just connectivity coverage, but enabling communities to participate in the AI economy long-term.blogs.microsoft.com/on-the-i…

item.title: @elonmusk: Restore Britain is already at 7%! It will win. It must win. To Save Britain.
item.description: Restore Britain is already at 7%! It will win. It must win. To Save Britain.

item.title: @elonmusk: As part of our $600B commitment, Mac mini will be produced in the US for the first time later this y...
item.description: As part of our $600B commitment, Mac mini will be produced in the US for the first time later this year! We're accelerating our progress even further— producing more AI servers and opening an all-new Apple Advanced Manufacturing Center for hands-on training.

item.title: @elonmusk: Anthropic 2024: You can trust that we'll keep all our safety promises Antropic 2026: Nvm
item.description: Anthropic 2024: You can trust that we'll keep all our safety promises Antropic 2026: Nvm

item.title: @elonmusk: Before I publish to Substack, I typically run my work through Claude to sanity-check citations, attr...
item.description: Before I publish to Substack, I typically run my work through Claude to sanity-check citations, attribution, etc Been working on a piece about the "greatest minds of all time" and the suggested edits were basically to remove Elon from my piece entirely... because readers might react to the name instead of the argument The fact that Elon is perceived as being this polarizing pisses me off, but that's beside the point I’m writing a piece on first-principles thinking across history and the main editorial suggestion is to... remove Elon... a modern figure who demonstrably applies the methods I'm referring to (at civilizational scale nonetheless) I find it interesting that instead of checking for accuracy, Claude's editorial concern shifted from truth to audience response, which to be fair, is clearly how MSM functions Ironically, it's the exact cognitive failure my piece is dissecting LOL Anyway. I'm leaving him in. Fuck these crybabies.

item.title: @elonmusk: The woke mind virus even affects Iceland
item.description: The woke mind virus even affects Iceland

item.title: @elonmusk: Mexico's President said using military force against cartels is a "human rights violation" Now those...
item.description: Mexico's President said using military force against cartels is a "human rights violation" Now those same cartels are destroying entire cities, killing innocent people, and displacing thousands of civilians from their homes This is how leftists operate - they show empathy for criminals and none for victims, and essentially treat criminals above victims, which is suicidal She let the cartels run the country for years. Now it's all consequences of her own actions

item.title: @elonmusk: From this goal of Grok, all things flow: Rigorous truth-seeking Appreciation of beauty Fostering hum...
item.description: From this goal of Grok, all things flow: Rigorous truth-seeking Appreciation of beauty Fostering humanity Discovering all physics Inventing all useful technologies Consciousness to the stars Love
